If there be two planets inside the halo around the Sun or the
Moon, there would be wars; if there be three planets, famine and
drought; if four, the king would die along with his ministers and
preceptors; and if five or more, there would be a near-destruction of
the universe.

If a non-luminary or an asterism comes to have an indepen-
dent halo around it, there will be the destruction of the monarch,
provided there is no appearance of a Ketu (Comet) at the time.
